description: ServicePorte replaces the tangle of disconnected sales tools — scattered chats, manual invoices, one-off links — with a single shareable business link customers use to browse, order, and pay in one flow. I took it from concept to deployment: the Nest.js and MongoDB API, the Next.js storefront and merchant dashboard, and the live launch.

Merry Heart is a digital savings platform that helps everyday people save with intention and grow their money through flexible, transparent plans and consistent returns. I took it from concept to deployment: modeling secure wallet and savings logic on PostgreSQL, the Nest.js transaction backend, the Next.js experience, and the live release.

MIHRA, an initiative of the Wellcore Health non-profit, is a platform advancing mental-health research, advocacy, and community programs for African youth. I took it from concept to deployment: a custom content-managed WordPress build the team updates independently, with a fast, accessible front end presenting their work to a global audience.

Karthlog bridges physical collectible cards with digital benefits, giving collectors one ecosystem where a card unlocks exclusive content, discounts, and community — blending digital currency with collectible art. I took it from concept to deployment: the Nest.js and PostgreSQL backend, the Next.js redemption interface, and the live release.

Dugoutt turns solo wagering into a social sport: users bet together, pool their stakes, predict outcomes, and take the pot — a shared, competitive experience instead of betting alone. I took it from concept to deployment: the pooled-prediction and payout engine, the Nest.js and Solana settlement backend, the Next.js client, and the live release.

Nairafinance is an AI-powered financial assistant that replaces spreadsheets and guesswork — users describe income, expenses, and goals in plain language and get instant calculations across loans, savings, tax, and travel. I took it from concept to deployment: the Nest.js and PostgreSQL backend, the AI insight engine, the Next.js app, and the live SaaS.

Rust Undead is a Solana battle game with a mission — "Know Solana Through Battle" — teaching newcomers how the Solana ecosystem works through hands-on, combat-based play instead of dry documentation. I took it from concept to deployment: the on-chain Rust and Anchor programs, the game and wallet logic, and the interactive Next.js front end.

OpenStake is a peer-to-pool sports-betting platform built for verifiability and transparency, letting users stake against open pools rather than an opaque house so every wager is provably fair. I took it from concept to deployment: the peer-to-pool settlement mechanics, the on-chain Solana and Anchor logic, the Nest.js services, and the Next.js client.

Benson Coleman & Associates is a Nigerian management consultancy that connects investors with credible healthcare opportunities while managing and restoring facilities across the country through financial and advisory services. I took it from concept to deployment: a polished corporate Next.js site presenting their services with a fast, accessible front end.

PeekNeed is an on-demand delivery and errand platform bringing same-day pickup, real-time package tracking, and personal shopping to businesses and busy individuals across Abia State, Nigeria. I took it from concept to deployment: the Nest.js and PostgreSQL backend, live tracking and order flow, the Next.js interface, and the live launch.
